body:
#### PR description:

This PR moves stored classes in the `SimDataFormats/GeneeratorProducts` to the io_v1 namespace

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2027

#### PR validation:

Code compiles
title: [EVOLUTION_X] Move stored products in `SimDataFormats/GeneratorProducts` to io_v1 namespace
